summary: Comprehensive testing of Winner's Consulting offer import, ratings, deadline logic, filters, and public fees display. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: offers display with ratings/views/favorites, deadline logic shows 'Date limite dépassée' for past deadlines, share button works, service fees are publicly visible, all filters functional.
critical_code_review_comments: OFFERS_DATA import endpoint properly skips duplicates based on title+university combination
Deadline status endpoint correctly parses French date formats including '1er' format and handles continuous enrollment
Real-time ratings computed from favorites count and views (formula: base 4.0 + fav_bonus + view_bonus)
Frontend ProgramsSection correctly displays favoritesCount with Heart icon when count > 0
OfferDetailModal correctly shows 'Date limite dépassée' when deadline.isOpen = false
Service fees tab publicly visible without 'Voir après connexion' restriction
seed_data_creation: 17 offers imported from OFFERS_DATA + 4 seeded = 21 total offers
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: (1) GET /api/offers returns 21 offers with computed rating and favoritesCount fields, (2) Deadline status correctly returns isOpen=false for past dates like '15 Janvier 2025', isOpen=true for 'Inscription continue', and correctly parses '1er Mars 2025' format, (3) Import endpoint skips duplicates (0 imported, 17 skipped on re-run), (4) All filters work (fullScholarship=9, partialScholarship, selfFinanced, online=5, new), (5) Frontend shows 'Date limite dépassée' for past deadlines, (6) Share button copies URL to clipboard with 'Copié!' feedback, (7) Frais tab shows service fees publicly without login requirement.

backend_apis.GET /api/offers: PASS - Returns 21 offers with rating and favoritesCount computed in real-time
backend_apis.GET /api/offers/{id}/deadline-status: PASS - Correctly handles past deadlines, continuous enrollment, and '1er' date format
backend_apis.GET /api/offers?filter_type=fullScholars: PASS - Returns offers with hasScholarship=true and isPartialScholarship=false
backend_apis.GET /api/offers/{id}/rating: PASS - Computes and returns rating based on favorites and views

frontend_ui.ProgramsSection_offers_display: PASS - Shows 21 offers with views, ratings, and favorites count (Heart icon)
frontend_ui.OfferDetailModal_deadline_check: PASS - Shows 'Date limite dépassée' for past deadlines (e.g., '15 Avril 2025')
frontend_ui.OfferDetailModal_share_button: PASS - Copies URL to clipboard, shows 'Copié!' feedback
frontend_ui.OfferDetailModal_frais_tab: PASS - Service fees publicly visible, no 'Voir après connexion' text
frontend_ui.Filter_buttons: PASS - All filters (Nouveauté, Bourse Complète, Bourse Partielle, Auto-financement, Cours en Ligne) work correctly
